summary: This process describes how to modify the details of an item that has already been created and saved in the inventory system.
steps: Click 'Edit' for the desired existing item, or use the search function to locate the item.
Modify the necessary fields (e.g., item name, item group, unit).
important_notes: The search function can be used to efficiently locate specific items for editing.
questions: How do I modify an existing item's details?
Where can I find the option to edit inventory items?
Can I search for an item before editing it?
What happens if I edit an item that is already in use?
